description: Introduction to data-driven techniques for surrogate modeling based engineering design. Apply data-driven approaches to engineering design problems such as design of structural and thermofluid components and systems.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (MATH 234or376), (MATH 320,340,341, or375), and (I SY E 210,B M E 325,E C E 331,MATH/​STAT  310,STAT 312,324,333or340), or graduate/professional standing
